description: An immersive opportunity to understand the physical processes of meteorological phenomena in mountain environments. Measuring and monitoring of snowpack, extreme weather and climate and their associated hazards in mountain ranges are prominent course themes. A field trip fee may be applied.
preAndCorequisites:
• Complete all of:
    • GEOG272 - Climatology and Hydrology (1.5)
supplementalNotes: • Credit will be granted for only one of GEOG 313, GEOG 391 (if taken in the same topic).
title: Field Studies in Mountain Meteorology
